scheme_name: Private Tuition Assistance to Scheduled Caste Students Studying in Standard 11th & 12th (Science Stream)
page_title: Private Tuition Assistance to Scheduled Caste Students Studying in Standard 11th & 12th (Science Stream)

details: The “Private Tuition Assistance to Scheduled Caste Students Studying in Standard 11th & 12th (Science Stream)” is implemented by the Director, Scheduled Caste Welfare, Government of Gujarat. Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to Scheduled Caste (SC) students who are studying in Standard 11th and 12th (Science Stream) and have obtained 70% or more marks in the 10th Standard for private coaching.
benefits: • 11th Standard: ₹15,000/- per annum as a private tuition fees
• 12th Standard: ₹15,000/- per annum as a private tuition fees
eligibility: The student should belong to the Scheduled Caste of Gujarat.
The student should be studying in Standard 11th & 12th Science Stream.
The student should have 70% or more marks in Standard 10th.
The annual family income of the student should be up to ₹6 lakhs.

online: The applicant may visit the Digital Gujarat Portal:
On the home page, click on ‘Register’ and the applicant will be redirected to the registration form page.
Enter your Mobile Number, Email, Set Password, and then click on ‘Save’.
After successful registration, the applicant can login through his/her User Name (Mobile No./Email ID) and Password.
Now, click on ‘My Profile’ to update your profile and fill in all the mandatory information.
After filling in profile details, click on ‘Update Profile’. The profile will be updated after entering the verification Code (OTP).
Now under services, select the ‘Scholarship Services’ and then click on ‘SC Scheme’.
Select the Financial Year in which you want to apply for and then click on ‘Change Financial Year’.
Select the scheme, read the interaction carefully, and then click on ‘Continue to Service’.
Fill in the application form completely and upload all the relevant documents.
Now, click on ‘Save as Draft’ and agree with the terms & conditions, and submit the application form by clicking on ‘Confirm & Final Submit’.
Photo uploading for all applicants is mandatory.
The application will be considered complete only when all sections are completed.

Only one application per applicant will be acceptable for Tuition coaching assistance. If any student submits more than one application either from a single institute or from multiple institutions his/her all applications will be rejected by the competent authority and no request from any side will be entertained.
In case of any wrong/misleading information provided in the application shall lead to rejection of the application by Department Authorities.
All required documents must be carefully scanned as per the instructions given.
The student has to fill his/her application carefully as there is no provision for institution change once the application is submitted successfully.
The unreadable uploaded documents will allow the competent authority to reject the student application.

documents_required: 4. Caste Certificate from the Competent Authorities
5. First Page of Bank PassBook/Cancelled Cheque
6. Income Certificate (Competent Authority)(Form No. 16 required for Govt. Employee)
8. Fee Receipt of Current Course Year

faqs.question: Who is eligible for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Eligibility criteria include belonging to the Scheduled Caste of Gujarat, studying in Standard 11th & 12th Science Stream, securing 70% or more marks in Standard 10th, and having an annual family income of up to ₹6 lakhs.

faqs.question: What are the benefits provided under this scheme?
faqs.answer: Assistance in total limit of ₹30,000/- consisting of ₹15,000/- by Standard 11th and ₹15,000/- for Standard 12th for private tuition to students of SC.

faqs.question: Is there any specific stream requirement for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, the scheme is specifically for students studying in the Science Stream of Standard 11th and 12th.

faqs.question: How can I apply for the benefits of this scheme?
faqs.answer: Applicants can apply for the scheme benefits by visiting the Digital Gujarat Portal at https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/.

faqs.question: Can students from other states apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: No, this scheme is specifically for Scheduled Caste students studying in Gujarat.

faqs.question: Is there any application fee for applying to this scheme?
faqs.answer: There is no application fee for applying to this scheme.

faqs.question: Can I apply offline for this scheme?
